session_053_completed: FILELINK CLICK FIXED — _tag_urls_in_log() and _tag_filepaths_in_log() moved to AFTER Copy button window_create() in ops_popup.py. Previously tags applied before button insert shifted all char indices making clicks miss.
CANVAS DIRECTORY GUARD — _on_canvas_file_drop() in canvas_window.py now guards is_file() before routing. Directories no longer open empty canvas.

PATH RESOLUTION STACK — ops_popup.py _open_file_in_canvas: expanduser().resolve() + is_file() + backtick strip. file_manager.py _expand(): home/ prefix fix + bare filename rglob fallback. wormbot.py wormbot_scan: same rglob fallback. All three handle bare filenames, ~/paths, missing /home/trinity prefix.
TRINITY IDENTITY CONTEXT — _build_identity_context() in chat_engine.py now injects home dir, Ethica root, full absolute path instruction. Trinity no longer hallucinates truncated paths.
FILELINK REGEX — _tag_filepaths_in_log() regex updated to match backtick-wrapped paths. strip() call strips backticks/quotes before Path resolution.

WORMBOT SURGICAL GATE — wormbot_scan() runs ast.parse() on fixed code before writing to disk. Aborts if fix has syntax error. is_file() directory rejection added. status_note injected into result dict rendered BEFORE [DEBUG:] block.
DEBUG TAB ] LEAK FIXED — chat_engine.py _process() debug push: greedy regex captured trailing ] as part of code. Fix: strip trailing ] from captured code before push_debug_from_ethica().
OPS_POPUP CLEANUP — Removed unused import os. Removed dead variable start = self._log.index(tk.END) in _insert_tree_result(). All imports (re, Path, datetime) now at module level.
PYTHON MODULE KEEPENDS FIX — python_module.py deduplication changed splitlines() to splitlines(keepends=True) + join('') — no indentation corruption from dedup.
WORMHUNTER AUDIT — worm hunt ~/Ethica/ui: 19 scanned, 14 broken, 5 clean. Full findings captured in next session priorities.

sanctuary_state.slot_7: J.A.R.V.I.S. — Infiltrator (ARMED — analyze + recon live, WhiteRabbitNeo pending)

lesson_learned_053: Tag ranges in Tkinter Text widgets are index-based — any insertion after tagging shifts all indices. Always tag AFTER all insertions are complete. The [DEBUG:...] block must be the absolute last thing in any WormBot result string — the greedy regex has no safe delimiter. Path resolution needs a consistent stack: expanduser → absolute check → rglob fallback — apply to every file-touching tool.
philosophy: Session 053 — 9 bugs found and closed. The links now open. The paths now resolve. The scanner now guards its own writes. Ethica watches itself more carefully. Next: clean the ui/ directory file by file. ⟁Σ∿∞
